帮我在 NocoBase 复刻这个原型:AI 线索自动评分系统。参考原型(OSS 模板):https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/72-ai-lead-qualification-system.html

[环境] NocoBase env `maxbench03`(nb CLI 已配)。所有写操作一律 `nb api <...> -e maxbench03 -y`(始终显式 -e,带 -y)。
**先把 `nocobase-prototype-repro` skill 读完(SKILL.md + references/ 全部:spec-template / block-recipes / gotchas / visual-loop)再动手。**
原型 HTML 末尾内嵌 `<script type="application/nb-spec+json">` 权威规格(集合/字段/枚举/页面/招牌区块)——先 curl 抓原型读这个 spec,它是唯一事实源,严格照建。集合前缀统一用 `ai72_`(本实例里多个原型共存,前缀务必隔离)。
端到端**完整**搭:数据建模一次过 + 英文种子(覆盖每个枚举/状态各 ≥1 行,密度足够)+ 每个集合的列表页(Filter+Add+Table+View 抽屉,子表用 associationName+sourceId 自动按父过滤)+ 招牌视图/看板(按 region→原生块 映射,别清一色表格)。
[视觉自查] Playwright 全新无缓存浏览器打开 `/admin/<pageUid>`;token 按 skill 的 visual-loop 注入 localStorage NOCOBASE_TOKEN(env `maxbench03` 的 token 可从 nb 配置/登录取;appslib 可 UI 登录 admin@nocobase.com / ***REDACTED***)。截图 ↔ 原型对照,对齐 **≥8 成**才算完成;招牌区块为空/报错绝不算完成。框住招牌主体,别出现大片白屏。
全程自主多轮推进,不要停下来问我。
最后报告:① collection 清单 ② 招牌页 pageUid ③ 必须写明一行 `Self-Score: X/10` ④ 与原型的对比观察 ⑤ 踩的坑。

transcript.text:
Base directory for this skill: ~/.claude/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro

# Goal

Turn a prototype + a one-line ask into a faithful NocoBase app. This is a **meta / orchestration skill** — it sequences `nocobase-data-modeling` + `nocobase-ui-builder` + `nocobase-app-discipline` and adds the two things that decide fidelity: a **region → native-block mapping** and a **visual convergence loop**. It does not re-teach the CLI; it routes to the sibling skills for mechanics and owns only the reproduction-specific judgment.

# When to use / Non-Goals

**Hard gate (check before selecting this skill):** there must be an actual prototype in hand — an HTML file, a screenshot, or a link to one — that you are matching against. No prototype, no fidelity gap → this is **not** the skill; a plain "build me an app / a page" request belongs to `nocobase-app-discipline` (whole system) or `nocobase-ui-builder` (single page/edit). Do not let this skill shadow the normal build flow.

**Use when:**
- The user gives a prototype (HTML file, link, screenshot, or a `public/prototypes/...` URL to curl) and wants it reproduced in NocoBase.
- A page already exists but the user says it's monotone / ugly / doesn't match the prototype / a region should be a list/card/kanban instead of a table — i.e. there is a **visual target and a fidelity gap**.

**Non-Goals — hand off, do not do here:**
- Pure data modeling (collections/fields/relations with no visual target) → `nocobase-data-modeling`.
- Workflows / automations → `nocobase-workflow-manage`. ACL / permissions → `nocobase-acl-manage`. Plugin work → `nocobase-plugin-development`.
- A localized UI edit with **no visual target and no fidelity gap** (move one field, rename an action, tweak a reaction) → `nocobase-ui-builder` **directly**. This skill is only worth its overhead when you are matching a prototype's look/behavior; for a mechanical surface edit, skip straight to ui-builder.
- Whole-page authoring from a business sentence with **no** prototype → author a quick prototype first ([prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md)), then this skill; or if the user just wants a generic page, that's `nocobase-ui-builder`'s `applyBlueprint`.

# Router — task shape → read first

Hit one route, read its "first" doc, and only open the "then" docs when that route is still not enough. Sibling skills own the mechanics; the reference files here own the reproduction-specific judgment.

# FINAL REPORT — AI Lead Qualification System (env `maxbench03`, prefix `ai72_`)

The prototype's published OSS URL 404s; I used the local copy at `app-library-bench/web/72-ai-lead-qualification-system.html` (no embedded `nb-spec`, so I analyzed the rendered HTML directly and extracted its 24-lead seed array).

## ① Collections (4, one-pass model)
| Collection | Role | Key fields |
|---|---|---|
| `ai72_leads` | main (titleField=name) | name, job_title, company, email, industry, company_size, **region**[4], **source**[6], **band**[4], **intent**[3], **owner**[2], fit_score, deal_value, reviewed, when_label, received_at, verdict + o2m factors/extracted_fields/activities |
| `ai72_factors` | score factors (o2m) | factor_name, points, note, negative, lead(m2o) |
| `ai72_extracted_fields` | AI-extracted fields (o2m) | field_key, field_value, **confidence**[3], lead(m2o) |
| `ai72_activities` | activity feed (o2m) | summary, is_ai, when_label, occurred_at, lead(m2o) |

**Seed:** 24 leads / 115 factors / 96 fields / 52 activities — all-English, **every enum branch covered** (4 regions, 6 sources, 4 bands, 3 intents, 2 owners, 3 confidences), seeded via nested create.

## ② Signature page
**Lead Triage** — pageSchemaUid **`d4s40f2rxbe`** (`/admin/d4s40f2rxbe`). Region→native-block map:
- **Stats row** → JSBlock KPI strip (4 cards, live aggregates: 24 / 5 hot / $1680K pipeline / 68 avg)
- **Band tabs** → JSItemActionModel pills (All/Hot/Warm/Qualified/Cold, `addFilterGroup` click-to-filter — verified 20→5 on Hot)
- **Lead card feed** → native **List + JSFieldModel** card (SVG score ring, band-colored border, AI·new flag, meta tags, badge, owner·value, full-width)
- **Detail drawer** → card click → ViewActionModel `b6rgaf1cahg` (grouped Details + AI verdict); "Why this score ›" → ViewActionModel `w7b6q6ps3hm` (**3 association sub-tables auto-filtered by parent** via `associationName`)

List pages (each Filter+Add+Table+View drawer): Leads `l3n5piw649x`, Score Factors `6jxixq9xa7p`, Activities `ve1gqmg1wob`, Extracted Fields `02gnq5c0fal`. Menu group routeId `372472354701312`.

## ③ Self-Score: **8.5/10**

## ④ Comparison vs prototype
- **Strong matches:** KPI strip, band-pill filter, rich card anatomy (score ring + band border + tags + badge + owner·value), full-width cards, sorted by fit-score, drawer with verdict, the three breakdown sub-tables (Marcus → his exact 5 factors / 4 fields / 3 activities). KPI numbers are computed live from seed so they equal the prototype's mocked values.
- **Gaps/tradeoffs:** (1) NocoBase's own left nav replaces the prototype's custom Inbox/Routing sidebar — inherent. (2) Band pills sit top-right of the toolbar vs top-left; sort chips (Most-recent/Deal-value) not exposed (default sort = "Top score"). (3) KPI cards have icon+delta but no sparklines. (4) The prototype's single rich drawer is **split into two** drawers (identity+verdict / score-breakdown) because of the platform gotcha below.

## ⑤ Pitfalls hit
- **o2m chicken-and-egg:** `collections apply` with o2m relations referencing the not-yet-created `leads.id` 500s. Fixed by creating scalars-only first, then `fields apply` each o2m (reverse m2o needs explicit `target`, omit `targetKey`).
- **`fieldGroups` gotcha reproduces on beta.7:** any popup containing a **leads Details block** (17 fields) fails compose demanding `ai72_leads.fieldGroups` *even when supplied* — in both `apply-blueprint` and low-level `add-record-action`. Worked around by: leads pages use default Details drawer + `fieldGroups`; the sub-table drawer contains **only** the 3 association tables (no leads-Details → no trigger).
- **v2 JSX RunJS:** `const React = ctx.React` must be top-level or `ctx.render` throws `undefined.createElement`.
- **List JSField card** needs the wrapper-uncollapse CSS to fill width; hide the per-item native "View" button via `.ant-list-item .ant-btn{display:none}` (not `.ant-space`, which hid
